Name: Human
Description: Versatile and well-rounded, humans bend a little toward everything.

Name: Elf
Description: Graceful and keen-minded, but slight of frame.

Name: Dwarf
Description: Hardy and stubborn, raised in stone and resistant to toxins.

Name: Halfling
Description: Small, nimble, and stout of heart.

Name: Gnome
Description: Clever tinkerers steeped in arcane study.

Name: Orc
Description: Brutally strong and tough, but slow to reason and easily rattled in mind.
